meta.title: Neteon.ai — Industrial Computing, AI-Ready
meta.description: Rugged industrial PCs, Edge AI platforms, and NVIDIA-accelerated computing — built for the harshest environments, backed by 22+ years of engineering expertise.

announcement.text: Edge AI platforms in stock. Free hardware consultation — we'll spec it for your workload in one call.

hero.sub: NVIDIA-accelerated Edge AI systems engineered for -40 °C to 70 °C operation — shipped validated, supported by engineers, backed by 22 years in the field.
hero.distributorLine: Authorized distributor · NVIDIA · Intel · Moxa · Neousys · Innodisk

rugged.title: Rugged Edge AI
rugged.body: Fanless NVIDIA-accelerated compute, MIL-STD-810 certified and tested from -40 °C to 70 °C. Wide-voltage input for vehicles, substations, and industrial automation cells — no datacenter required.

gpu.title: GPU Computing
gpu.body: NUVO-10000 class platforms drive up to 350 W discrete GPUs on PCIe Gen4. Multi-GPU configurations for deep-learning training and real-time video analytics — at the edge, under load, 24/7.

jetson.title: Jetson Platform
jetson.body: NVIDIA Jetson from Orin Nano to AGX Orin, delivering up to 275 TOPS. Industrial I/O carriers with secure boot and long-life production support — design it in once, ship it for a decade.

networking.title: Industrial Networking
networking.body: Managed and unmanaged Ethernet switches, 5G/LTE cellular gateways, and OT cybersecurity appliances from Moxa and Teltonika. Certified for hazardous locations and rolling-stock deployments.

storage.title: Industrial Storage
storage.body: Innodisk industrial-grade SSDs and DRAM with wide-temperature operation, power-loss protection, and predictive health telemetry — storage that surfaces wear before it becomes downtime.

compact.title: Fanless Compact
compact.body: Palm-sized POC-700 systems with Intel Core processors, PoE, and IP67 options. Ideal for kiosks, digital signage, and space-constrained machine-vision deployments where every mm matters.

products.sub: From palm-sized fanless PCs to 350 W GPU platforms — every system validated by our engineers for your workload, your temperature band, and your uptime target.

rugged-edge.name: Rugged Edge AI Computers
rugged-edge.description: NVIDIA-accelerated fanless systems certified MIL-STD-810 — deploy AI inference on the factory floor, in the substation, or inside the vehicle without a gateway in between.

compact.name: Fanless Compact PCs
compact.description: Palm-sized POC-700 series with Intel Core, PoE, and IP67 options — power kiosks, signage, and space-constrained machine-vision cells without a fan to fail.

gpu.name: GPU Computing Platforms
gpu.description: NUVO-10000 series with 350 W discrete GPU headroom and PCIe Gen4 — purpose-built for real-time video analytics, deep-learning training, and autonomous systems.

jetson.name: Jetson Edge AI Platform
jetson.description: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano → AGX Orin, shipped on industrial-I/O carriers with secure boot — up to 275 TOPS in a footprint small enough to mount anywhere.

networking.name: Industrial Networking
networking.description: Managed Ethernet, 5G/LTE gateways, and OT security appliances from Moxa and Teltonika — hardened networks that don't drop packets when the plant floor heats up.

storage.name: Industrial Storage & Memory
storage.description: Innodisk SSDs and DRAM with power-loss protection, wide-temp operation, and predictive health telemetry — storage that fails loudly before it fails silently.

solutions.sub: Smart factories, substations, rail, wellpads, wind farms, and data halls — our hardware runs where an outage is measured in revenue, safety, or both.

manufacturing.name: Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: Machine-vision QA, predictive maintenance, and line-side inference — catch defects before they ship.

energy.name: Energy & Utilities
energy.description: SCADA, substation edge compute, and grid telemetry on hardware rated for the hard jobs.

transportation.name: Transportation
transportation.description: Fleet, rail, and maritime compute — wide-voltage, shock-rated, certified where it counts.

datacenter.name: Data Centers
datacenter.description: Edge nodes and remote-site infrastructure where density, uptime, and serviceability matter equally.

oilgas.name: Oil & Gas
oilgas.description: Remote monitoring, safety systems, and wellpad compute built for extreme environments.

renewable.name: Renewable Energy
renewable.description: Solar, wind, and storage monitoring — rugged wide-temp platforms that survive the site, not just the datasheet.

why.sub: Every product ships with the context, configuration, and support required to make it work in the field. That's the difference between a catalog and a partner.

experience.title: Industrial DNA, not a catalog reseller
experience.body: Since 2002 we've powered industrial infrastructure across every wave — serial, Ethernet, 4G, now edge AI. We know the environments your systems actually live in.

curated.title: Validated before it ships
curated.body: We don't list everything — we list what our engineers have tested. NVIDIA, Intel, Moxa, Neousys, Innodisk. Breadth isn't a substitute for fit.

engineers.title: Engineers, not call centers
engineers.body: You get the same people who've deployed edge systems in plants, substations, and vehicles. When you call, we've configured the box you're holding.

testimonials.sub: Deployed in factories, substations, and fleets — supported by engineers who've configured the same hardware you're running.

items.quote: Neteon's deep knowledge of industrial computing and their ability to recommend the right platform for our factory floor AI deployment saved us months of evaluation time.
items.author: Systems Integrator

items.quote: The rugged edge computers have been running 24/7 in our substation for over three years without a single failure. That's the kind of reliability we need.
items.author: Infrastructure Manager

cta.body: Browse the complete catalog of rugged industrial PCs, Edge AI platforms, and networking — in stock, validated, and ready to ship. Or tell us the workload and we'll spec it with you in one call.

contact.title: Talk to the team that ships the systems.
contact.sub: Free hardware consultation. One-business-day response. Sales, support, and engineering on the same lines.

quote.title: Talk to an engineer
quote.sub: Tell us about your deployment — we'll spec the right hardware and reply within one business day.

labels.message: What are you trying to deploy?
labels.consent: By submitting, you agree to be contacted about your inquiry. We respect your data — see our Privacy Policy.

quote.success: Thanks — we'll be in touch within one business day.
quote.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email sales@neteon.net.

footer.tagline: Provider of rugged Edge AI computers, NVIDIA-accelerated platforms, and industrial networking — engineered for reliability since 2002.
